depends_on.name: stimulus_tuningcurve_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the tuning curve this calculation was performed on.

fields.name: result_data
fields.documentation: Structure containing the tuning curve calculation results. Keys and value types are specific to the calculator named in calculator.calculator_name (e.g., preferred direction, tuning width, modulation index).

fields.name: log
fields.documentation: Free-text log entry summarising the tuning-curve calculation (e.g., 'angle best value is 135.', 'sFrequency = 0.04'). Captured verbatim from v1 documents that carried a `log` field.

fields.name: stim_property_list
fields.documentation: Stimulus-property name/value pairs that conditioned this tuning-curve calculation. v1 stored this as `{names: [<param_name>, ...], values: <scalar or array>}`; V_delta preserves the same shape. `names` is the list of independent stimulus parameter names selected for the curve (most commonly a single name such as 'sFrequency'); `values` is the corresponding value(s).

fields.name: names
fields.documentation: Array of stimulus parameter names (e.g., {'sFrequency', 'tFrequency'}). Empty array when no stimulus property was held; v1 most often ships a 1-element array.

fields.name: values
fields.documentation: Numeric value(s) paralleling `names`. v1 ships either a scalar (when names is 1-element) or an empty array.
